top_signals.title: Pound Weakens Amid Starmer Resignation; Iran Cites Peace Talk Progress | Bloomberg Brief 6/22/2026
top_signals.summary: US equity futures waver and oil dips as Iran cites "major progress" in peace talks with the US. The pound falls against major currencies as UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces his resignation. Monica Defend of Amundi Investment Institute looks ahead to a busy week of economic data.   (Source: Bloomberg)
